CHAPTER_INDEX_EXISTS: So chuong da ton tai cho truyen nay.
CHAPTER_INVALID: Chuong khong thuoc truyen nay hoac chua duoc xuat ban.
PARENT_COMMENT_NOT_FOUND: Khong tim thay binh luan goc.
PARENT_COMMENT_MISMATCH: Binh luan goc thuoc truyen khac.
ALREADY_FOLLOWING: Ban da theo doi truyen nay.
NOT_FOLLOWING: Ban chua theo doi truyen nay.
REPLY_DEPTH_EXCEEDED: Do sau tra loi vuot qua gioi han.
FORBIDDEN: Ban khong co quyen thuc hien hanh dong nay.
